scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "uv run --directory backend uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && electron-forge make
